---
title: "project-checkpoint-2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

```{r}
# Using R
# Option 1: tidytuesdayR R package 
## install.packages("tidytuesdayR")
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2025-06-24')
## OR
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2025, week = 25)

cases_month <- tuesdata$cases_month
cases_year <- tuesdata$cases_year

View(cases_month)
View(cases_year)

library(gt)
```

**Which country and region have the most measles and rubella cases combined?**

```{r}
total_country_cases <- cases_year |>
  mutate(
    across(c(measles_total, rubella_total), as.numeric)) |>
  group_by(region, country) |>
  summarize(
    total_measles = sum(measles_total),
    total_rubella = sum(rubella_total),
    .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(
    total_cases = total_measles + total_rubella) |>
arrange(desc(total_cases))

total_country_cases |>
  head(10) |>
  gt() |>
  
  cols_label(
    region = "Region",
    country = "Country",
    total_measles = "Total Measles Cases",
    total_rubella = "Total Ruebella Cases",
    total_cases = "Total Combined Cases"
  ) 
```
